title: Nakhal Heat Wave
lead: Nakhal is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.34. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Nakhal is causing extreme temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 21.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 24%, and the wind speed is 16.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The lack of rainfall and high temperatures are expected to continue, worsening the situation.
